comments.name: ed
comments.text: Wish I'd seen this when I bought mine! I made it through okay but nothing beats a guide from a trusted friend. I might honestly *start* with the "why" section of this article. After all, I think you're mostly writing this for people who don't already have a good mic + would need to be brought on board!

comments.name: Regal
comments.text: Ohp that's a very good point, thank you! I've adjusted the order b/c yeah you're totally right :3
